ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., drizzle, rain, sunny) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "condition_code" TEXT /* Short code for the weather condition (e.g., DRZ, RN, SUN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being checked */,
  "qc_type" TEXT /* Type of quality control check (e.g., range, consistency) */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_control_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the instrument is used */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., thermometer, barometer) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_instruments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
